result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  EntityDb.MongoDb.Provisioner [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create-role <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name>
  create-user <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name> <service-password>
  create-collections-cluster <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name> <service-password> <cluster-name>
  create-collections-serverless <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name> <service-password> <instance-name>
  create-collections-direct <service-name> <connection-string>

Options:

  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

  create-role <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name>
  create-user <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name> <service-password>
  create-collections-cluster <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name> <service-password> <cluster-name>

result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  EntityDb.MongoDb.Provisioner create-collections-cluster <group-name> <public-key> <private-key> <service-name> <service-password> <cluster-name> [options]

Arguments:
  <group-name>        The name of the MongoDb Atlas Group/Project to access via API.
  <public-key>        The public key used to authenticate via API.
  <private-key>       The private key used to authenticate via API.
  <service-name>      The name of the service that will use this database.
  <service-password>  The password for the service that will use this database.
  <cluster-name>      The name of the Cluster on which the entity will be provisioned.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  <public-key>        The public key used to authenticate via API.
  <private-key>       The private key used to authenticate via API.
  <service-name>      The name of the service that will use this database.
  <service-password>  The password for the service that will use this database.
  <cluster-name>      The name of the Cluster on which the entity will be provisioned.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
